title: La mujer perdida
writer: Jesús María de Arozamena, Tulio Demicheli, Manuel Pombo Angulo
actors: Sara Montiel, Giancarlo Del Duca, Massimo Serato
plot: Sara, son of fishermen, flees from her village and in Madrid she meets Rafael, who helps with her artistic career, but ends up fleeing to Italy where she meets Miguel, a sculptor she falls in love with.
